issues.description: Missing condition: LeaderHasType {New Fish-Man Pirates}. DSL only checks for resting DON but card text requires leader type check first.
Missing action: SetupDon (or equivalent). Card text explicitly states 'set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active' before the power boost.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text states 'during this turn' which means the power boost only applies while it's your turn, not permanently until end of turn.
